title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited:
Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
